sentences.arabic: كَانَ الرَّسَّامُ يَرْسُمُ الأَشْكَالَ عَلَى جُدْرَانِ الْكَهْفِ.
sentences.translation: Slikar je crtao oblike na zidovima pećine.
sentences.translationEn: The artist used to draw shapes on the walls of the cave.

sentences.translation: Crtao je životinje, drveće i ljude.
sentences.translationEn: He drew animals, trees, and human figures.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ يَسْتَخْدِمُ أَلْوَانًا مِنَ الطِّينِ وَالْأَحْجَارِ.
sentences.translation: Koristio je boje od gline i kamenja.
sentences.translationEn: He used colours made from clay and stones.

sentences.arabic: بَقِيَتْ هَذِهِ الرُّسُومَاتُ حَتَّى يَوْمِنَا هَذَا.
sentences.translation: Ovi crteži ostali su do naših dana.
sentences.translationEn: These drawings have remained until our day.
